hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py && "$FILE" != */vault/writer.py ]]; then if grep -nE '\.(write_text|write_bytes)\(|open\([^)]+[,"]\s*["\x27]w' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⛔ VIOLATION: Direct file write detected in $FILE — all vault writes must go through vault/writer.py" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == */pipelines/*.py ]]; then if grep -nE 'if .*(confidence|score).*[<>]=?\s+0\.[0-9]' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⛔ VIOLATION: Hardcoded confidence threshold in $FILE — thresholds belong in config/thresholds.yaml" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == */mcp_server/tools.py ]]; then if grep -nE '^\s+(if |elif |for |while )' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⛔ VIOLATION: Logic detected in mcp_server/tools.py — move it to the pipeline" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py && "$FILE" != */prompts/* ]]; then if grep -nE 'f["\x27].*(summarize|classify|extract|summarise|prompt|system_prompt)' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⚠️  WARNING: Possible hardcoded prompt f-string in $FILE — prompts belong in prompts/*.yaml" >&2; fi; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE'; then echo '⛔ BLOCKED: Destructive command' >&2; exit 2; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "AI-kms"' 2>/dev/null || true
